name: ai-budddy
description: A multi-component project with a Next.js frontend and a Node.js Express backend.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend/ai-buddy" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend/ai-buddy && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix frontend/ai-buddy && npm run build --prefix backend
